job.title: Dot Net Full Stack Developer @ Advancesoft India Pvt Ltd. (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Job Description – .NET Full Stack Software Engineer**

**Position:** .NET Full Stack Software Engineer  
**Experience:** 8–12 Years  
**Location:** Bengaluru  
**Work Model:** Hybrid  
**Compensation:** ₹35–40 LPA (for candidates from Top Tier Product/Technology Companies)  
**Notice Period:** Immediate to 30 Days Preferred

**About the Role**

We are seeking experienced **.NET Full Stack Software Engineers** with strong expertise in **C#, .NET, Azure Services, SQL Server, and ReactJS** to join a high-performing engineering team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, enhancing, and supporting enterprise-grade applications while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable and secure technology solutions.

Insurance domain experience will be considered an added advantage.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using .NET technologies and ReactJS.
* Build and support RESTful APIs, microservices, and cloud-native solutions.
* Develop responsive and intuitive user interfaces using ReactJS and related frontend technologies.
* Work with Azure cloud services to build secure, high-availability applications.
* Optimize SQL Server databases, queries, stored procedures, and application performance.
* Participate in technical design discussions, architecture reviews, sprint planning, estimations, and code reviews.
* Ensure adherence to coding standards, security guidelines, and best engineering practices.
* Troubleshoot production issues and provide timely resolutions.
* Mentor junior engineers and contribute to knowledge-sharing initiatives.
* Collaborate with product, QA, DevOps, and business stakeholders to deliver high-quality solutions.

**Required Technical Skills**

**Backend**

* Strong experience in **C# and .NET/.NET Core**
* ASP.NET Web API development
* Entity Framework
* Microservices Architecture
* Object-Oriented Design (OOD) and Design Patterns

**Frontend**

* Minimum **1+ year of hands-on experience in ReactJS**
* React Hooks, State Management, React Router
* JavaScript/TypeScript
* HTML5, CSS3, SASS

**Database**

* SQL Server
* Database Design
* Query Optimization
* Stored Procedures and Performance Tuning

**Cloud & DevOps**

* Microsoft Azure Services, including:
* Azure App Services
* Azure Functions
* Azure SQL
* Azure Storage
* Azure Monitor
* Azure DevOps
* CI/CD Pipelines
* Git Version Control

**Additional Skills**

* Unit Testing and Code Quality Practices
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities

**Desired Candidate Profile**

* 8–12 years of software development experience.
* Strong hands-on experience in Microsoft technology stack.
* Proven experience in developing enterprise-scale applications.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.
* Ability to independently drive technical solutions and mentor team members.
* Insurance domain experience is a plus.

**Educational Qualification**

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.

**Interview Process**

**2–3 Rounds**

* Technical Evaluation (Virtual)
* Technical/Managerial Discussion (Virtual)
* Final Round (In-Person at Bengaluru Office)

**Preferred Target Companies**

**High Priority**

* Microsoft

**Top Tier Product & Technology Companies**

* Intuit
* Google
* Amazon
* Apple
* Adobe
* Oracle
* Nvidia
* PayPal
* Visa
* Mastercard
* Goldman Sachs
* Morgan Stanley
* Cisco
* Fiserv

**Strong Engineering & Consulting Organizations**

* Thoughtworks
* EPAM Systems
* Publicis Sapient
* Harman
* Emids
* PowerSchool
* Kyndryl
* IQVIA
* Mera

**Share Profiles To: ravi@advancesoftindia.com**

**Recruitment Note**

Kindly share relevant candidate profiles matching the above requirements, preferably from the targeted companies listed above. Candidates with strong expertise in **.NET, Azure, SQL Server, and ReactJS**, and those available to join within **30 days**, will be given preference.

Pay: ₹3,500,000.00 - ₹4,000,000.00 per year

Application Question(s):

* Are you willing to relocate to Bengaluru?
* Your current CTC, Exp CTC and Notice Period (should be < 30 days)
* Are you from Top Tier Product & Technology Companies (pls see the JD)?
* How many years of exp in .Net Fullstack?
* How many years of exp in C# and .NET/.NET Core?
* Do you have exp in React JS?

Work Location: In person

job.title: Fresh Graduates & Postgraduates @ TPN (Remote, IN)
job.description:

Eligibility

* BCA / MCA
* B.Sc. / M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT)

**Experience:** Freshers and candidates with up to 2 years of experience are welcome to apply.

Desired Skills

Responsibilities

* Participate in training and knowledge-sharing sessions.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams.
* Deliver high-quality work within project timelines.

Selection Process

Pay: From ₹10,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Work from home

Work Location: Remote

job.title: Senior Technical Lead - React.js, Angular, Java @ HCLTech (MH, IN)
job.description:
Nagpur, Maharashtra
  
Job Summary
  
Role Summary
  
  
Full Stack Developer who can design, develop, and deliver high‑quality software solutions across the full technology stack. This role requires strong technical expertise, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams. You will lead development initiatives, mentor junior engineers, and play a key role in shaping technical architecture and engineering best practices
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Design, develop, and maintain scalable, high‑performance web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies.
  
Develop RESTful APIs, microservices, and integration layers.
  
Write clean, maintainable, and testable code while adhering to coding standards
  
Optimize application performance, scalability, and security.
  
Participate in code reviews, design reviews, and sprint planning.
  
Troubleshoot complex issues across the full stack and implement robust solutions.
  
Ensure quality through automated testing (unit, integration, and end-to-end).
  
Skill Requirements
  
Required Skills & Experience
  
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  
8+ years of hands‑on experience as a full stack developer.
  
Strong experience with back-end technology Java, Spring Boot and Microservices, Kafka
  
Proficiency in front-end technologies Angular
  
Expertise in RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and asynchronous communication.
  
Experience in high scaled application design with high performancd
  
Have experience in Kafka
  
Strong understanding of MSSQL and MongoDB.
  
Knowledge of Spring Security ( Practical knowledge of HTTP/2, TLS, API Gateways, and token-based authentication (OAuth2, JWT)
  
Have hand on in GCP/AWS
  
Knowledge of Devops Basics, CI/CD Pipeline
  
Have Experience in Docker and Kubernetes (K8)
  
Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills.
  
Ration of knowledge in between front end and Backend Technologies is 50-50
  
Anthropic claude , Pair Programming with AI is Preferred
  
Other Requirements
  
Experience Level
  
  

* 8–12 years of Fullstack or application engineering experience.

job.title: Lead System Engineer - Information Technology (Software Engineer - ICC) @ Hdfc Life Ltd (MH, IN)
job.description:
### **What are we looking for?**

We are looking for an experienced Spring Boot Developer with 7–10 years of professional expertise in building enterprise-grade applications. The candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining microservices-based solutions, ensuring high performance, scalability, and reliability.

### **What does the job entail?**

Application Development

Design, develop, and maintain applications using Java, Spring Boot, and Spring Cloud.

Build and optimize RESTful APIs and microservices for seamless integration.

Implement robust solutions with focus on performance, scalability, and security.

System Design & Integration

Collaborate with architects and senior engineers to design system components.

Integrate applications with databases, messaging systems, and external APIs.

Ensure smooth deployment and integration with CI/CD pipelines.

Quality & Best Practices

Write clean, maintainable, and testable code following industry standards.

Conduct unit testing, integration testing, and participate in code reviews.

Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues across environments.

Collaboration

Work closely with product owners, QA engineers, and DevOps teams.

Participate in agile ceremonies (daily stand-ups, sprint planning, retrospectives).

Provide technical input during requirement analysis and solution design.

### **Work Experience**

Required Skills & Experience



7–10 years of experience in Java development with strong expertise in Spring Boot.

Hands-on experience with microservices architecture and Spring Cloud.

Strong knowledge of RESTful APIs, JSON, and messaging systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ).

Proficiency in SQL/NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).

Experience with DevOps tools (Git, Jenkins, Maven/Gradle, CI/CD pipelines).

Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

Solid understanding of software design patterns and best practices.

Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.

### **Essential Qualification**

Exposure to event-driven architectures and domain-driven design (DDD).

Knowledge of security frameworks (OAuth2, JWT).

Experience with front-end technologies (Angular, React) for full-stack collaboration.

Familiarity with performance tuning and scalability optimization

### **Preferred Skills**

Hands-on experience with microservices architecture and Spring Cloud.

Strong knowledge of RESTful APIs, JSON, and messaging systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ).

Proficiency in SQL/NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).

Experience with DevOps tools (Git, Jenkins, Maven/Gradle, CI/CD pipelines).

Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

Solid understanding of software design patterns and best practices.

Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.

job.title: DST Business Analyst and Business Intelligence Developer - Husky (Guindy,Chennai) @ Husky Injection Molding (TN, IN)
job.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.

Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state-of-the-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.

Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  

**Job Description**

The DST Business Analyst and Business Intelligence Developer for Husky will be responsible for designing, delivering, and maintaining the company’s enterprise business intelligence ecosystem, leveraging both internal and external data sources. This role will lead the development and support of enterprise-wide BI applications, data models, and analytics architecture. Working closely with senior business and IT stakeholders, the position will translate strategic data and information requirements into actionable solutions that enable data-driven decision making.

The incumbent will address complex technical challenges, optimize performance across BI platforms, and define data elements that drive meaningful insights and measurable business value. The role will also establish testing standards, develop and deliver training programs to enhance user adoption, and promote self‑service analytics. Additionally, this position will define governance standards, policies, and procedures for BI tools and data structures, establish data quality metrics, and evaluate emerging technologies to support continuous improvement of Husky’s enterprise BI capabilities.

**Key Responsibilities & Key Success Metrics**

* Leading BI software development, deployment and maintenance
* Perform Data Profiling and Data Analysis activities to understand data sources
* Report curation, template definition and analytical data modeling
* Work with cross-functional teams to gather and document reporting requirements
* Translate business requirements into specifications that will be used to implement the required reports and dashboards, created from potentially multiple data sources
* Identifies and resolves data reporting issues in a timely fashion, while looking for continuous improvement opportunities.
* Build solutions that create value and resolve business problems
* Provide technical guidance to designers and other stakeholders
* Work effectively with members of Digital Solutions Team
* Troubleshoots analytics tool problems and tunes for performance
* Develops semantic layer and analytics query objects for end users
* Translation of business questions and requirements into reports, views, and analytics query objects
* Ensuring that quality standards are met
* Supporting Master Data Management Strategy

**Qualifications:**

**Technical Skills & Experience**

* Strong understanding of ERP and operational system data structures, with the ability to interpret, navigate, and optimize complex relational databases.
* Advanced proficiency in writing high‑performance SQL queries against large‑scale, complex datasets, including optimization and troubleshooting.
* Hands‑on experience in data visualization, dashboard design, and data storytelling, with the ability to translate analytical insights into clear, compelling, and actionable narratives.
* Experience designing, debugging, and deploying BI solutions within an Azure DevOps (ADO) environment, including CI/CD practices, version control, and release management.
* Proficiency with the Microsoft BI Stack, including:

* Power BI (data modeling, DAX, visualization best practices, Power BI Service)
* SQL Server Analysis Services (SSAS/AAS)—tabular model development, optimization, and deployment

Experience working with Azure Data Platform services such as Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS), Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Synapse Analytics, and Power BI Service.

Knowledge of Databricks or Microsoft Fabric is considered a strong asset.

**Business & Functional Knowledge**

* Basic understanding of manufacturing and sales business processes, with the ability to translate operational requirements into analytical solutions.
* Experience working in an international or distributed business environment, collaborating across regions and time zones.

**Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills**

* Strong analytical capabilities, with the ability to interpret requirements, profile data, validate output, and ensure accuracy across BI solutions.
* Adept at diagnosing data inconsistencies, performance issues, and modeling challenges, proposing effective, scalable solutions.

**Communication & Collaboration**

* Excellent communication and presentation skills, capable of conveying technical concepts to business stakeholders in clear, understandable terms.
* Ability to facilitate meetings, workshops, and design sessions, enabling effective collaboration and informed decision-making.
* Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work collaboratively with cross‑functional teams, including Data Engineering, Business Analysts, and business partners.

**Language Requirements**

* Proficiency in English is required.
* Knowledge of German or French is considered an asset.

  

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

job.title: Sr Developer - Shotscope™ (.NET Full Stack)- Husky (Guindy, Chennai) @ Husky Injection Molding (TN, IN)
job.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.

Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state-of-the-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.

Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

**Job Description**

Lead the technology behind Shotscope™, one of Husky’s flagship software solutions powering real time manufacturing intelligence on factory floors worldwide.

As Tech Lead for Shotscope™, Husky’s plantwide monitoring and execution solution, you will drive the technical direction of a product that connects machines, processes, and data to improve production, quality, energy efficiency, and uptime. This is a hands-on technical leadership role where your decisions directly influence how factories operate.

If you want to build industrial grade software that truly matters, Shotscope™ puts you at the core of Industry 4.0.

**Responsibilities**

**Technical Leadership**

* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)

* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD

* Technical direction for the product area

* Contribute to coordinating cross-team dependencies and integration points

**Delivery & Execution Excellence**

* Contribute to the feature definition and review

* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection

* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks

* Helping with estimation and sprint planning

* Addressing technical impediments

* Own production readiness (incl. non-functional requirements)

**Quality, Governance & Security**

* Ensuring code quality

* Conducting meaningful code reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria

* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)

**Incident Response**

* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post-mortems

**Mentorship & Team Growth**

* Mentoring team members

* Documenting key design decisions

* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions

* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement

**Collaboration & Communication**

* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams.

* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.

* 10+ years professional experience in software development.

* Proficiency in .NET technologies (C#, ASP.NET Core, SQL, .NET Framework, Entity Framework).

* Strong grasp of Agile methodologies, DevOps principles, application security and version control systems (e.g., Azure DevOps).

* Proficiency in modern front-end frameworks (e.g., preference: React; Angular).

* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test-driven Development.

* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevOps practices.

* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.

* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.

* Fluency in English (spoken and written).

* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.

**Assets**

* Experience using AI assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.

* Familiarity with Microsoft Azure, with experience in leveraging key services (e.g., Azure App Services, Azure Functions).

* Exposure to Microsoft SQL Server BI stack, including SSAS (OLAP cube design), SSRS (report development), and SSIS (ETL processes and data integration).

**Why Husky?**

* Regulated Working Hours: Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well-being.

* Visible Impact: Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.

* Strategic Influence: Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.

* Empowered Involvement: Take an active role in decision-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.

* Valued Contributions: Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.

* Impactful Role: Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.

* Cutting-Edge Projects: Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.

* Supportive Community: Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.

  

* Collaborative Environment: Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

  

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

job.title: Senior Developer – Azure Full Stack (Adv+Elite) (Guindy, Chennai) @ Husky Injection Molding (TN, IN)
job.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.

Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state-of-the-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.

Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  

**Job Description**

Do you want to build industrial-grade IoT software that connects real machines with cloud intelligence at global scale?

As a Senior Developer on our Advantage+Elite IoT platform, you’ll work hands-on across our Azure-based IoT stack, developing and evolving solutions that turn machine, edge, and cloud data into reliable, production-ready capabilities for customers worldwide. You’ll own complex implementations at component and feature level, ensure high quality and performance, and help keep a mission-critical platform stable while it continuously evolves.

This role is ideal for an experienced engineer who enjoys solving hard technical problems, working close to real-world systems, and delivering robust solutions in a distributed team — while influencing quality and best practices without carrying overall technical ownership.

If you want your code to run in production, at scale, and close to the physical world, Advantage+ Elite puts you right where software meets machines.

**Responsibilities**

**Technical Implementation**

* Understand and implement solutions based on the defined LLD (low level design).
* Own complex implementations at component/module level.
* Ensure correctness, performance, security, and maintainability of delivered solutions.
* Make sound technical decisions within assigned scope, escalating broader design concerns as needed.

**Delivery & Execution Excellence**

* Translate approved requirements and designs into working software.
* Break down assigned features into actionable tasks.
* Provide reliable estimates for owned work.
* Deliver high-quality increments aligned with sprint goals.
* Proactively resolve technical issues within assigned scope.

**Quality, Standards & Engineering Practices**

* Write code that is reliable, readable, and maintainable, and follow the team’s agreed standards and best practices
* Participate in meaningful code reviews.
* Ensure adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) and DoD (Definition of Done) criteria.
* Identify and address technical debt within owned components/module.

**Incident & Operational Support**

* Troubleshoot and resolve complex defects and production issues.
* Contribute to root cause analysis and long-term fixes.
* Ensure adequate logging and observability in implemented components.

**Collaboration & Mentorship**

* Collaborate closely with Tech Leads, Architects, Product Owners, QA, and Platform teams.
* Support and mentor junior and mid-level developers.
* Contribute to continuous improvement within the team.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 5+ years professional experience in software development.
* Experience with programming languages like C#, PowerShell, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or others relevant to Azure development.
* Experience using Microsoft .NET, Angular, React or similar frontend frameworks.
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., REST).
* Experience with SQL or NoSQL databases, particularly those offered on Azure.
* Proficiency in using various Azure services like Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Storage, etc.
* Understanding and knowledge of cloud security best practices.
* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test-driven Development.
* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevSecOps practices.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.

**Assets**

* Experience using AI assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.
* Hands-on experience with Azure IoT Hub and Azure Data Explorer.
* Experience with Edge Device development and support of IoT based, event driven applications.
* Experience working with and contributing to UX designs.
* Working experience with infrastructure as code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or ARM templates.
* Relevant certifications (e.g. Azure Developer Associate, Azure IoT Developer Specialty, Azure Cosmos DB Developer Specialty).

**Why Husky?**

* **Regulated Working Hours:** Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well-being.
* **Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.
* **Strategic Influence:** Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.
* **Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.
* **Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.
* **Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.
* **Cutting-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.
* **Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.
* **Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.

Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  

**Job Description**

Do you want to work an industrial grade software solution powering real time manufacturing intelligence on factory floors worldwide?

As a Developer on our Shotscope™ team, you will help build and maintain industrial-grade manufacturing intelligence software used by customers worldwide. You will implement features and components on a .NET and Azure-based full stack, contribute clean and reliable code, and support the continuous evolution of a mission-critical product that connects machines, processes, and data.

This role is ideal for a motivated engineer who enjoys hands-on development, learning from experienced teammates, and seeing their work deployed in real production environments—with clear opportunities to grow toward senior and lead roles.

If you want your code to have visible impact on how factories operate, Shotscope™ is where software meets the real world.

**Responsibilities**

**Technical Implementation**

* Implement software components and features based on provided designs, specifications, and guidance.
* Contribute to the development of reliable, maintainable, and secure code within the assigned scope.
* Apply agreed coding standards, patterns, and best practices in daily development work.
* Make basic technical decisions within assigned tasks, escalating questions or uncertainties when needed.

**Delivery & Execution Excellence**

* Translate assigned requirements and tasks into working software.
* Complete development work in alignment with sprint goals and delivery commitments.
* Contribute to task breakdowns and effort estimates for assigned work.
* Proactively raise risks, blockers, or implementation issues to the team.

**Quality, Standards & Engineering Practices**

* Write clean, testable code and contribute to unit and integration tests.
* Participate in code reviews, incorporating feedback and learning from peers.
* Ensure individual contributions meet Definition of Ready (DoR) and Definition of Done (DoD) criteria.
* Follow established DevOps, security, and quality practices.

**Incident & Operational Support**

* Assist in troubleshooting defects and issues in development and production environments.
* Support corrective (bug fixes) and evolutive (enhancements) maintenance of existing solutions.

**Collaboration & Growth**

* Collaborate effectively with other developers, QA, Product Owners, and Tech Leads.
* Seeking feedback and guidance to continuously improve technical skills.
* Actively learn the systems, tools, and technologies used by the team.
* Contribute positively to team culture and shared ownership of outcomes.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 4+ years’ professional experience in software development.
* Proficiency in .NET technologies (C#, ASP.NET Core, SQL, .NET Framework, Entity Framework).
* Strong grasp of Agile methodologies, DevOps principles, application security and version control systems (e.g., Azure DevOps).
* Proficiency in modern front-end frameworks (e.g., preference: React; Angular).
* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test-driven Development.
* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevOps practices.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.

**Assets**

* Familiarity with CI/CD and pipelines.
* Experience using AI‑assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Azure, with experience in leveraging key services (e.g., Azure App Services, Azure Functions).
* Exposure to Microsoft SQL Server BI stack, including SSAS (OLAP cube design), SSRS (report development), and SSIS (ETL processes and data integration).

**Why Husky?**

* **Regulated Working Hours:** Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well-being.
* **Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.
* **Strategic Influence:** Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.
* **Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.
* **Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.
* **Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.
* **Cutting-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.
* **Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.
* **Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

You’ll work closely with architects, product managers, and distributed engineering teams to turn high‑level ideas into **robust, scalable, and secure solutions**—while keeping technical excellence, quality, and long‑term maintainability at the core.

If you enjoy **owning technical decisions**, guiding teams through complexity, and building systems that matter in the physical world, this role puts you exactly where impact is highest.

**Responsibilities**

**Technical Leadership**

* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD

* Contribute to coordinating cross team dependencies and integration points

**Delivery & Execution Excellence**

* Contribute to the feature definition and review

* Ensuring code quality

**Incident Response**

* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post-mortems

**Mentorship & Team Growth**

* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement

**Collaboration & Communication**

* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams.
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders.

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10+ years professional experience in software development.
* Experience with programming languages like C#, PowerShell, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or others relevant to Azure development.
* Experience using Microsoft .NET, Angular, React or similar frontend frameworks.
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., REST).
* Experience with SQL or NoSQL databases, particularly those offered on Azure.
* Proficiency in using various Azure services like Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Storage, etc.
* Understanding and knowledge of cloud security best practices
* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test-driven Development.
* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevSecOps practices.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.

**Assets**

* Experience using AI‑assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.

* Experience with Edge Device development and support of IoT based, event driven applications
* Experience working with and contributing to UX designs
